channel.title: Corvus Arcade
channel.description: Most recent updates to Corvus Arcade.

item.title: Version 0.2.0
item.description:
• A brand-new look. Corvus Arcade has been redesigned around a dark performance dashboard that keeps Play and your Mac's live status up front.
  • A new Home library. Every game and its status now show on a visual grid.
  • A live performance readout. A GPU and memory gauge sits right next to Play, with a rolling graph while you play.
  • Readiness checks with quick fixes. The game page flags things like tight memory and offers a one-tap fix before you play.
  • Everything organized into tabs. Overview, Graphics, Game settings, and Performance, so the setting you want is one click away.

item.title: Version 0.1.3
item.description:
• Game Settings, right in the launcher. Change a game's display mode, resolution, graphics quality, and frame-rate cap from Corvus Arcade, on the game's page.
  • Windowed mode. Games can open in a movable Mac window when the game itself is set to Windowed.
  • Various fixes and polish under the hood.

item.title: Version 0.1.2
item.description:
• Low-memory warning. On Macs with limited memory, Corvus Arcade now shows which apps are using the most, so you can close them for smoother play.
  • Free memory during play. Optionally close a game's launcher, like Battle.net, once the game starts, to free up memory. Turn it on in Settings.
  • Recommended in-game settings. Each game now lists the options that run best on Mac, right on its page.
  • Built-in performance log, so lag and stutter are easy to look into. Manage log space in Settings.
  • Smoother and more reliable under the hood.

item.title: Version 0.1.1
item.description:
• Snappier launching. The Play button responds the moment you click it, and shows a loading indicator while your game starts up.
  • Smarter window handling. Corvus Arcade steps aside only once your game is on screen, and comes right back when you close it.
  • Fewer permission pop-ups. Launching a game no longer keeps asking for access to your folders.
  • Smoother play. Your game keeps running smoothly even after your Mac clears out temporary files.
  • Update controls in Settings. Check for updates yourself, and turn automatic updates on or off.
  • Automatic updates are on by default, so you always have the latest alpha.

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description:
• First public alpha
  • Tested with Battle.net and Overwatch on Apple Silicon
